\tzpentry{ID5506}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5506 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\mathrm{eff}}=\rho_0+\alpha N+\beta|\nabla\theta|^2+\gamma|\psi|^2. \label{eq:rho_eff} \end{equation}
